description: BugBrain QA platform for AI coding tools: autonomous exploratory testing, test plans, a11y audits.
name: tech.bugbrain/mcp

environmentVariables.description: BugBrain API key (sk_live_...) — create one in BugBrain → Settings → API Keys
environmentVariables.name: BUGBRAIN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the BugBrain API base URL (default https://api.bugbrain.tech)
environmentVariables.name: BUGBRAIN_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Custom tunnel command template for the create_tunnel tool ({port} is substituted; default uses cloudflared)
environmentVariables.name: BUGBRAIN_TUNNEL_CMD
